title: Home Care vs. Assisted Living Cost Comparison
summary: See two care paths side by side — edit any number to match your family's situation.

fields.label: In-home care hours per week
fields.hint: Paid help with daily tasks, companionship, or supervision

fields.label: Hourly rate for care
fields.hint: Varies by region and level of care needed

fields.label: Existing home costs that continue
fields.hint: Mortgage or rent, utilities, property tax — costs that don't go away

fields.label: Care level add-on
fields.hint: Most facilities charge extra based on care needs

regionNote: Costs vary significantly by region and facility — these are editable starting assumptions, not fixed averages.
disclaimer: This is a planning estimate, not financial advice. It doesn't account for insurance, Medicaid, veterans' benefits, or the value of a home if it were sold or rented out — all of which can meaningfully change this comparison for your family.
